title: Warm Malaysian Tofu Curry
description: A cultured and comforting Malaysian dish featuring apple cider vinegar and flambe, served in a scallop shell, this ovo-vegetarian-friendly curry is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat and saute the onion until softened.
Add the garlic and ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the curry powder to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cubed tofu to the pan and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, apple cider vinegar, and salt to the pan, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a kitchen torch to flambe the mixture, being careful not to burn the curry.
Stir in the beaten eggs and cook until the eggs are set.
Serve the curry in scallop shells and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
